channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head: Theobroma, Ep. 153
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: You're right Marco, John has talked about how honey gets lost in the brewing process so that's why beers don't taste like "honey" when they say it's used as an ingredient. I'll have to get John on this so he explain in more detail why that happens during the brewing process.
item.content:encoded: You’re right Marco, John has talked about how honey gets lost in the brewing process so that’s why beers don’t taste like “honey” when they say it’s used as an ingredient. I’ll have to get John on this so he explain in more detail why that happens during the brewing process.

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
If you ever find out what kind of Honey they use in that beer, I'd love to know. Also, what technique in how to brew with it, as my experience brewing with honey or maple syrup gets fermented out and the flavour isn't in the final product.
Cheers, Marco
item.content:encoded:
If you ever find out what kind of Honey they use in that beer, I’d love to know. Also, what technique in how to brew with it, as my experience brewing with honey or maple syrup gets fermented out and the flavour isn’t in the final product.

Cheers,
Marco
